tender.description: Under Chief Minister Announcement No. 634-2024 Reconstruction of the road stretch from Km 5.000 to Km 12.255 is proposed by Thin White Topping TWT on National Highway No. 109 in District Udham Singh Nagar, within Kichha Assembly Constituency, from Pt
